# TML Agency — townmedialabs.com

> TML Agency is a full-service digital marketing and branding agency based in Chandigarh, India, with 15+ years of experience and 500+ brands scaled across India, US, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and UAE.

## Services

- **Branding & Brand Strategy** — Logo design, brand identity, positioning, and visual systems
- **Web Development & Design** — Custom websites built with Next.js, React, and modern frameworks
- **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)** — Technical SEO, on-page optimization, link building, and local SEO
- **Google Ads Management** — PPC campaign management, shopping ads, and remarketing
- **Social Media Marketing** — Content creation, community management, and paid social across Meta, LinkedIn, and YouTube
- **Lead Generation** — Performance marketing funnels, landing page optimization, and CRM integration
- **Graphic Design** — Marketing collateral, packaging design, and social media creatives
- **Video Editing & Production** — Brand films, ad creatives, and social content production
- **AI Influencer Management** — Virtual influencer creation and management
- **Music Release & Promotion** — Artist branding, Spotify promotion, and release campaigns

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2010
- Headquarters: CO 112, Basement, Sector 34A, Chandigarh 160022, India
- Team Size: 70-100 employees
- Clients Served: 500+ brands
- Client Retention Rate: 98%
- Average Rating: 4.9/5
- Contact: info@townmedialabs.com | +91-98726-48209

## Industries Served

Healthcare, Real Estate, Education, E-commerce, SaaS, Legal, Finance, Hospitality, Manufacturing, Restaurants, Automotive, Fashion, Non-Profit, Fitness, Architecture, Agriculture, Logistics, Entertainment, Sports, Travel, Crypto, Luxury Brands, and more.
